script_text: Fact books sometimes have new words you do not know.
That is totally fine. Good readers are curious.
Let us learn how to figure them out!
When you meet a new word, look at the words around it.
The other words give you clues about what it means.
Sometimes the book will even tell you!
Listen. The habitat is the place where an animal lives.
What is a habitat? The place where an animal lives! The book told us right in the sentence.
If you still do not know the word, ask someone or check a dictionary!
Now you are ready to figure out new words!
